news_items.headline: Mariners keep picking up steam, win 7th straight on Young walk-off
Sean Manaea earned another turn in Mets' rotation with best outing of season to this point
news_items.summary: Mets lefty Sean Manaea was absolutely spectacular serving as the bulk reliever for the first time this season Monday, piecing together easily his best outing to this point.

news_items.headline: Jazz spends Yankees' off-day with Jimmy Fallon on NBC's Tonight Show
Arizona Diamondbacks 4, Los Angeles Dodgers 1: Tommy & Nolan & Ketel & E-Rod
news_items.summary: Record: 32-27. Pace: 88-74. Change on 2025: +4. May finished in rough shape for the D-backs beating swept in Seattle. For much of tonight, it looked like June would start the same way. While Eduardo Rodriguez had kept the team in the game, the Arizona bats appeared still be circling on a luggage carousel at […]

news_items.headline: Mets outpitched and outhit in loss in Seattle
news_items.summary: The Mets were unable to win a game in which their only offense was a couple of home runs.

news_items.headline: Mets manage just two hits, waste Sean Manaea's gem in 3-2 walk-off loss to Mariners
news_items.summary: The Mets' offense couldn't get much going, managing just two solo homers in a walk-off loss to the Seattle Mariners on Monday night.
